children.text: ① Reset (6× changeVariableValue)  →  ② timeDelay 300ms  →  ③ branch: score ≥ 60?  →  ④ nested branch: ≥ 90 / ≥ 30  →  ⑤ forEach over 3 items (loopBody: increment)  →  ⑥ whileLoop (stop when retryCount ≥ 3)  →  ⑦ final changeVariableValue

children.text: executeComponentAction calls a named action directly; runProjectWorkflow calls a sub-workflow.

props.className: w-full rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4

children.text: forEach [1..5]: continueLoop on even, breakLoop when sum ≥ 4. Result: 1+3 = 4. passThroughCondition blocks workflow unless flag is true.

children.text: copyToClipboard, stopPropagation, printPdf, downloadFileFromUrl, createUrlFromBase64, encodeFileAsBase64.

props.className: relative border border-dashed border-orange-400 rounded-lg p-2 cursor-default
w-full rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4

children.text: Card 16 — Branch inside Loop inside Branch
score ≥ 50 → forEach [A,B,C]: branch(item=B) → breakLoop else increment. Status = done-true. score < 50 → done-false.

props.className: w-full rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4

children.text: Card 17 — multiOptionBranch + whileLoop + forEach + continueLoop + passThroughCondition
fast: whileLoop until count ≥ 3. slow: forEach [1..5] skip evens → odd sum = 9. skip: passThroughCondition if flag=true → skipped.

props.className: w-full rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4

children.text: Counter starts at 0. Decrement is clamped at 0 (min: 0). Reset sets it back to 0 via setVar.
